title: Oaks Delight
body:
### Description
Oaks Delight is another Farmer's Delight add-on focusing on adding more types of food and useful decoration blocks, whilst expanding the mod to fit more into your world and build style.

# Features
## Advancements
- Breedwinner - Make a slice of bread
- Crumb Collector - Eat every Bakery item
- Hot and Spicy - Eat all spicy food
- Feel the Burn - Eat something spicy
- Ghosted - Survive eating a ghost chilli
- Supersized - Make and eat a double cheeseburger
- Would you like fries with that? - Craft your first set of fries.

## New Blocks
- New Stove Types
> - Blackstone Stove
> Stone Brick Stove
> End Stone Stove
> Oven - an iron metal stove for modern builds
- 12 New Wooden Drawer Blocks
- A Keg - used for decoration or storing liquids
- Cheese Press - Turns milk into cheese
- Tray - a decoration block perfect for your storage rooms
- Display Case - displays any food items with the tag "c:foods/edible_when_placed"
- Bakery Sign

## New Foods
- Bread Slice
- Toast
- Bacon Egg Sandwich
- Cheese
- Cheese Toastie
- CheeseBurger
- Chocolate Popsicle
- Hotdogs
- Pork Sausages
- Cooked Pork Sausages
- Pasta with Sausages
- Potato Chips (w/ non and w/o poisonous)
- Potato Sticks (w/ non and w/o poisonous)
- Potato Slices (w/ non and w/o poisonous)
- Potato Fires (w/ non and w/o poisonous)
- San Choy Bow
- Mac and Cheese
- Chilli
- Chilli Jar
- Chilli Stew
- Ghost Chilli
- Ghost Chilli Jar
- Spicy Mutton Wrap
- Spicy Cooked Chicken
- Spicy Hotdogs
- Spicy Noodles
- Croissant
- Chocolate Donut
- Sweet Berries Donut
- Chocolate Cake w/ Slices
- Sweet Berries Cake w/ Slice
- Muffins
- Pancakes
- Taco
- Double Cheese Burger
- Chocolate Soft Serve
- Vanilla Soft Serve
- Veggie Burger
- And more!

## Item
- Butter - food ingredient
- Bat Wing - food ingredient

## Drinks
- Milkshake (Chocolate, Sweet Berries, Glow Berries)
